title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: AWS CDK tutorial demonstrating Infrastructure as Code by building a serverless REST API with Python. The video contrasts manual console setup of DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway against CDK-based deployment, comparing CDK to CloudFormation and Terraform.
